preservedBehaviors.description: AccountHeader conditionally renders account picker button via onOpenAccountPicker prop
AccountHeader uses border styling with borderColor on back button
Account details screen has 3-segment control: Activity, Transfer, Statements
Account details screen displays balance card with Available balance
Account details screen has transfer form via useTransferForm
Statement screen has WebModal for viewing and Browser button for external open
StatementsHeader accepts onOpenPeriod prop for period selection
Period range computation handles December-to-January rollover
Statement screen shows Summary with deposits, withdrawals, and transaction count
